title: Amazon Announces 17 New Renewable Energy Projects in Spain
content: Amazon announced 17 new projects in Spain and its first renewable project in Portugal, the TÃ¢mega Wind Complex, set to be Portugalâ€™s largest wind farm, combining wind and hydroelectric power. Amazon remains the largest corporate buyer of renewable energy and met its 100% renewable energy goal by 2023, seven years ahead of schedule. These projects support local grids, job creation, and sustainability efforts toward Amazonâ€™s net-zero target by 2040.
author: Analysts Account
